title: Beehiiv vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Beehiiv vs Sendinblue: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between Beehiiv and Sendinblue comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Beehiiv is built for newsletter publishers and media operators, while Sendinblue targets transactional email and SMS campaigns. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.
choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on newsletter publishers and media operators
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on transactional email and SMS campaigns

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Beehiiv wins for newsletter publishers and media operators, while Sendinblue is stronger for transactional email and SMS campaigns. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue starts at a lower price point ($25/mo vs $39/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Sendinblue to Beehiiv is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
